name: Vanilla Bean Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. If the vanilla beans are shorter than 5-6 inches, use three beans; otherwise, use two.
2. I prefer to use Myers dark Jamaican rum for this recipe, which is truly delightful, especially when enjoyed in a cup of coffee on a chilly day.
3. Optionally, add glycerin.
4. Allow the vanilla beans to steep in the vodka for two weeks.
5. Remove the beans and add the sugar syrup.
6. Shake well.
7. Enjoy your cordial. You may choose to scrape the seeds from the beans and return them to the rum before soaking the beans again to intensify the vanilla flavor.
